                                                                                                                    egy to support the sound and rapid social and economic develop-
                                                                                                                    ment and promote the modernization process. China’s modernization is a significant initiative to rejuvenate the
                                                                                                                    Chinese nation and an important chapter in the development history
                                                                                                                    of world civilization. Characterized by the coexistence of both
                                                                                                                    advanced and backward facets and the intertwining of both old and
                                                                                                                    new contractions, the present-day modernization is facing many
                                                                                                                    unprecedented opportunities and challenges. With a high sense of
                                                                                                                    mission and responsibility, under the guidance of the scientific out-
                                                                                                                    look on development, all members of CDB have joined forces with
                                                                                                                    people from all walks of the society to energetically explore the
                                                                                                                    theory and practice of development-oriented finance with Chinese
                                                                                                                    characteristics and do their bit to accomplish the country’s all-round
                                                                                                                    modernization as soon as possible.
